## Quick Reference

```bash
cargo build ${WORKSPACE_FLAG}      # Build project
cargo test ${WORKSPACE_FLAG}       # Run tests
cargo clippy ${WORKSPACE_FLAG}     # Run linter
cargo fmt ${WORKSPACE_FLAG}        # Format code
```

## Working Conventions

- Tests must pass before completing any task
- `cargo test` at the end of every task
- All new public items must have doc comments (`///`)
